Instead of traditional RAG (retrieve-and-answer from scratch every time), the LLM incrementally builds and maintains a persistent wiki from your sources。

repos.name: agentic-awesome-skills

repos.name: sub2api

repos.name: webmail

repos.description_zh: JMAP Webmail专为21世纪打造。由JMAP协议支持的Stalchar Mail服务器的现代化自托管电子邮件客户端。电子邮件、日历、联系人和文件。快速、私有和开源。
